# Fra-Ber Multiforce Powerful Degreaser for Grease, Oil, Engines and Industry

- 

€8,92





Unit price
/ per

650 ml4.54 L

notifications_active
Notify me



### THE BENEFITS OF MULTIFORCE

Multiforce by Fra-Ber is a powerful and concentrated degreaser for stubborn dirt such as grease and oil, ideal for cleaning car interiors and exteriors and all types of vehicles and surfaces.

Main features:

- 
Cleans stubborn dirt: it effectively cleans the toughest dirt such as traffic film or grease and oil, making it the ideal cleaner for engines or workshops;

- 
All-purpose cleaner: t can also be used on stubborn dirt around the home such as outdoor furniture and grease stains in the garage;

- 
Fresh fragrance: it leaves a pleasant clean scent after each application;

- 
Multi-format: it is available in both a ready-to-use 650 ml format and a 4.54 L format;

- 
Foaming trigger: the 650 ml format has a foam delivery trigger for an even deeper and more intensive cleaning action also on vertical surfaces;

- 
Suitable for all work environments: it can be used in all work environments, including shipyards, industrial plants, automotive repairs shops, workshops;

- 
Extra shine: it has an effective renewing effect with anti-corrosion agents for grease, smog, stains and traffic film;

- 
No added EDTA and NTA*: it is formulated taking into account the most environmentally hazardous substances to be avoided, such as EDTA and NTA.

*May contain traces.

### MULTIFORCE IS IDEAL

- As a degreaser that can be used to clean both cars and stubborn dirt around the home;

- For more efficient, rapid cleaning and washing;

- For effective cleaning of workplaces in contact with oil and grease such as workshops, industrial plants and shipyards.

### HOW TO USE MULTIFORCE

We recommend using Multiforce as a cleaner and degreaser for exceptionally dirty surfaces.

Main steps:

- Spray the product and leave on for 1 minute;

- Rinse with a damp cloth.

Use: use the product pure.

To clean light dirt**: dilute to a ratio of 1: 3 i.e., use 250 ml of product and top up with water (750 ml) to obtain a 1 L ready-to-use solution.

**For use as an APC (All-Purpose Cleaner)**: dilute to a ratio of up to 1:10, i.e., use 90 ml of product and top up with water (910 ml) to obtain a 1 L ready-to-use solution.

**Precautions**: Do not allow the product to dry and do not apply in the sun and on hot or delicate surfaces.

### SAFETY INFO & DATA SHEET

**PRODUCT CODE**

701040 - R:2 MULTIFORCE 650 ML

701010 - MULTIFORCE 4.54 L

**SAFETY INFORMATION**

** 701040 - R:2 MULTIFORCE 650 ML **

![image](https://cdn.shopify.com/s/files/1/0566/8850/9136/files/Simboli_pericolo_5.png?v=1698148518)

**DANGER**

**H315** Causes skin irritation.

**H318** Causes serious eye damage.

**P101** If medical advice is needed, have product container or label at hand. 

**P102** Keep out of reach of children.

**P103** Read carefully and follow all instructions.

**P264** Wash hands thoroughly after handling.

**P280** Wear protective gloves/protective clothing/eye protection/face protection.

**P305+P351+P338 IN CASE OF CONTACT WITH THE EYES:** rinse carefully with water for several minutes. Remove contact lenses if present and easy to do. Keep on rinsing. 

**P310** Immediately contact the Poison Centre

**Contains**: C9-11 Pareth-8, Quaternary ammonium comp, C12-14-alkyl(hydroxyethyl) dimethyl, ethoxylated, chlorid.

**Contains among other ingredients**: Less than 5%: Phosphonates, Cationic surfactants, Phosphates, Non-ionic surfactants. Perfume (Linalool, Hexyl Cinnamal). Preservatives (Benzisothiazolinone, Phenoxyethanol).

## Why Choose FRA-BER

![image](//shop.fra-ber.it/cdn/shop/files/Piu_acquisti_piu_risparmi_x50.svg?v=1698322795)

##### MORE YOU BUY MORE YOU SAVE!
Our products are concentrated for greater effectiveness and are also sold in savings size, with discounts available for multiple quantity purchases, you can save time and money!

![image](//shop.fra-ber.it/cdn/shop/files/Spedizioni_x50.svg?v=1698322828)

##### SHIPMENTS ALL OVER ITALY AND EUROPE
We ship our products all over Italy, including islands, and to all countries in Europe, to receive them directly and comfortably to your home or business address!

![image](//shop.fra-ber.it/cdn/shop/files/Spedizione_gratuita_x50.svg?v=1698322847)

##### FREE EU SHIPPING ON ORDERS OVER 110 € WITH A FREE GIFT INCLUDED
Shipping to Italy is free for all orders over €65 and includes one of our specially selected gifts!

![image](//shop.fra-ber.it/cdn/shop/files/Pagamenti_sicuri_x50.svg?v=1698322860)

##### SAFE PAYMENTS
Pay safely online using all major payment methods such as credit card, bank transfer or in 3 interest-free installments with Paypal.
